301.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sharik (may Allah be pleased with her) that food was prepared containing some of these vegetables and brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He disliked it and said to his Companions: "Eat, for I am not like one of you — I fear that I may offend my companion," meaning the angel.
301.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Syarik (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa makanan yang mengandung beberapa sayuran ini disiapkan dan dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau tidak menyukainya dan bersabda kepada para sahabatnya: "Makanlah, karena aku tidak seperti salah seorang dari kalian — aku khawatir dapat mengganggu sahabatku," maksudnya malaikat.

302.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Ayyub (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The Quran was revealed in seven dialects. Whichever you recite is sufficient."
302.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Ayyub (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Al-Quran diturunkan dalam tujuh dialek. Mana pun yang kamu baca adalah cukup."

303.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about the child born of fornication. He said: 'There is no good in him. Two sandals with which I fight in the way of Allah are more beloved to me than freeing a child of fornication.'"
303.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang anak yang lahir dari zina. Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak ada kebaikan padanya. Dua sandal yang dengannya aku berjuang di jalan Allah lebih aku cintai daripada memerdekakan anak zina.'"

304.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about a man who kissed his wife while fasting. He said: 'He has broken his fast.'"
304.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang seorang laki-laki yang mencium istrinya sementara berpuasa. Beliau bersabda: 'Ia telah membatalkan puasanya.'"

305.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the virtue of prayer in the mosque of the Prophet ﷺ. She asked: "What about one who cannot travel to it?" He said: "Let him send oil to be used as a lamp in it, for whoever sends oil for it is like one who prays in it."
305.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai keutamaan shalat di masjid Nabi ﷺ. Ia bertanya: "Bagaimana dengan orang yang tidak bisa pergi ke sana?" Beliau bersabda: "Hendaklah ia mengirimkan minyak untuk digunakan sebagai lampu di sana, karena barangsiapa mengirimkan minyak untuknya adalah seperti orang yang shalat di dalamnya."

306.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hisham bint Haritha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I did not memorize Surah Qaf except from the mouth of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he was giving the sermon on Fridays." She said: "Our bread oven and the bread oven of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ were one."
306.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hisyam binti Haritsah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku tidak menghafal Surah Qaf kecuali dari mulut Rasulullah ﷺ ketika beliau berkhutbah pada hari Jumat." Ia berkata: "Tungku kami dan tungku Rasulullah ﷺ adalah satu."

307.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hisham bint Haritha ibn al-Nu'man (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I did not learn Surah Qaf and the Majestic Quran except from behind the Prophet ﷺ — he used to pray with it in Fajr."
307.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hisyam binti Haritsah bin al-Nu'man (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku tidak mempelajari Surah Qaf dan Al-Quran yang Mulia kecuali dari belakang Nabi ﷺ — beliau biasa shalat dengannya pada waktu Subuh."

308.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatima bint Abi Hubaysh (may Allah be pleased with her) that she came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and complained to him about bleeding. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "That is only a vein. Watch — when your period comes, do not pray. When the period passes, purify yourself and pray between one period and the next."
308.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Abi Hubaysy (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan mengadukan pendarahan kepadanya. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Itu hanyalah pembuluh darah. Perhatikan — ketika haidmu tiba, jangan shalat. Ketika haid berlalu, bersucilah dan shalatlah di antara satu haid ke haid berikutnya."

309.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ came, she said: "O Messenger of Allah, this is Fatima bint Abi Hubaysh — she fears she will have no share in Islam and may be among the people of the Fire. She has been experiencing istihadah for as long as Allah wills, and she has not prayed any prayer for Allah the Almighty." He said: "Tell Fatima bint Abi Hubaysh to count the days of her menstrual period each month, then perform ghusl, use cotton pads, restrain the flow, and keep herself clean. She should then purify herself at the beginning of each period."
309.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ datang, ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, ini adalah Fatimah binti Abi Hubaysy — ia khawatir tidak akan mendapat bagian dalam Islam dan mungkin termasuk penghuni neraka. Ia telah mengalami istihadah selama yang Allah kehendaki, dan ia tidak shalat satu shalat pun untuk Allah 'Azza wa Jalla." Beliau bersabda: "Beritahukan Fatimah binti Abi Hubaysy untuk menghitung hari-hari haidnya setiap bulan, kemudian mandi, menggunakan kapas, menahan aliran, dan menjaga kebersihan dirinya. Ia kemudian harus bersuci di awal setiap haid."

310.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Kurz al-Khuza'iyya (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "A baby boy was brought to the Prophet ﷺ and urinated on him, so he ordered that water be sprinkled on it. Then a baby girl was brought and she urinated on him, so he ordered that it be washed."
310.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Kurz al-Khuza'iyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seorang bayi laki-laki dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ dan kencing di atasnya, maka beliau memerintahkan agar diperciki air. Kemudian seorang bayi perempuan dibawa dan kencing di atasnya, maka beliau memerintahkan agar dicuci."

311.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that he prayed four rak'ahs inside the Ka'ba. When he finished he said: "I asked Usama ibn Zayd where the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had prayed inside the House, and he told me it was here." He said: "I reproach myself — I stayed with him for so long without asking how many rak'ahs he prayed." He came back the following year and stood in the same place. Ibn al-Zubayr came and prayed four rak'ahs in it.
311.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia shalat empat rakaat di dalam Ka'bah. Ketika selesai ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Usamah bin Zaid di mana Rasulullah ﷺ shalat di dalam Baitullah, dan ia memberitahuku bahwa di sini." Ia berkata: "Aku menyalahkan diriku sendiri — aku bersamanya begitu lama tanpa bertanya berapa rakaat yang beliau shalat." Ia kembali pada tahun berikutnya dan berdiri di tempat yang sama. Ibnu al-Zubayr datang dan shalat empat rakaat di sana.

312.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him), who was an old man, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Gnaw the meat off the bone, for that is more wholesome and beneficial" — or: "more delicious and beneficial." Sufyan said: "I am unsure whether the doubt is from me or from him."
312.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu), yang sudah tua, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Gigitlah daging dari tulang, karena itu lebih menyehatkan dan bermanfaat" — atau: "lebih lezat dan bermanfaat." Sufyan berkata: "Aku tidak yakin apakah keraguan itu dariku atau darinya."

313.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Death by plague, death from a stomach ailment, death by drowning, and death in childbirth are all martyrdom." He said: "Abu Uthman narrated this to us several times and once traced it directly to the Prophet ﷺ."
313.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Kematian akibat pes, kematian akibat penyakit perut, kematian akibat tenggelam, dan kematian saat melahirkan semuanya adalah syahid." Ia berkata: "Abu Utsman menceritakan ini kepada kami beberapa kali dan sekali menelusurinya langsung kepada Nabi ﷺ."

314.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "It was a loan guaranteed to be returned." Some of it was lost, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ offered to compensate him for it. He said: "O Messenger of Allah, today I am more desirous of Islam than that."
314.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Itu adalah pinjaman yang dijamin dikembalikan." Sebagian hilang, dan Rasulullah ﷺ menawarkan untuk menggantinya. Ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, hari ini aku lebih menginginkan Islam daripada itu."

315.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "While I was sleeping, a thief came and took my garment from under my head. I caught him and brought him to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'This man stole my garment.' He ordered that his hand be cut. I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, that was not what I intended — it is a gift to him.' He said: 'Why did you not do that before bringing him to me?'"
315.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Sementara aku tidur, seorang pencuri datang dan mengambil bajuku dari bawah kepalaku. Aku menangkapnya dan membawanya kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Orang ini mencuri bajuku.' Beliau memerintahkan agar tangannya dipotong. Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, bukan itu yang aku inginkan — itu hadiah untuknya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Mengapa kamu tidak melakukan itu sebelum membawanya kepadaku?'"

316.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave to me on the day of Hunayn while he was the most hated person to me. He kept giving to me until he became the most beloved person to me."
316.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ memberi kepadaku pada hari Hunain sementara beliau adalah orang yang paling aku benci. Beliau terus memberi kepadaku hingga beliau menjadi orang yang paling aku cintai."

317.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that a thief was brought to the Prophet ﷺ and he ordered his hand to be cut. Safwan said: "O Messenger of Allah, I have pardoned him." He said: "Why did you not do that before bringing him to me, O Abu Wahb?" The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then carried out the punishment.
317.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pencuri dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau memerintahkan agar tangannya dipotong. Shafwan berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, aku telah memaafkannya." Beliau bersabda: "Mengapa kamu tidak melakukan itu sebelum membawanya kepadaku, wahai Abu Wahb?" Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian melaksanakan hukuman itu.

318.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man stole a striped garment from him and was brought to the Prophet ﷺ who ordered the punishment. Safwan said: "O Messenger of Allah, I have gifted it to him." He said: "Why did you not do so before bringing him to me?" He then said: "O Messenger of Allah, people say that one cannot enter Paradise unless one has emigrated." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "There is no emigration after the conquest of Mecca — but there is jihad and intention. And when you are called to mobilize, then mobilize."
318.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki mencuri kain bergaris miliknya dan dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ yang memerintahkan hukuman. Shafwan berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, aku telah menghadiahkannya kepadanya." Beliau bersabda: "Mengapa kamu tidak melakukan itu sebelum membawanya kepadaku?" Kemudian ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, orang-orang mengatakan bahwa seseorang tidak bisa masuk surga kecuali ia telah berhijrah." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada hijrah setelah penaklukan Mekah — tetapi ada jihad dan niat. Dan ketika kalian diminta untuk dimobilisasi, maka mobilisasilah."

319.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: "Death by plague is martyrdom, drowning is martyrdom, death from a stomach ailment is martyrdom, and death in childbirth is martyrdom."
319.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: "Kematian akibat pes adalah syahid, tenggelam adalah syahid, kematian akibat penyakit perut adalah syahid, dan kematian saat melahirkan adalah syahid."

320.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Death by plague, death from a stomach ailment, death by drowning, and death in childbirth are martyrdom." Sulayman said: "Abu Uthman narrated this to us several times and once raised it to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ."
320.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Kematian akibat pes, kematian akibat penyakit perut, kematian akibat tenggelam, dan kematian saat melahirkan adalah syahid." Sulaiman berkata: "Abu Utsman menceritakan ini kepada kami beberapa kali dan sekali menelusurinya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ."

321.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by him while he was picking meat off a bone with his hands. He said: "O Safwan." He said: "At your service." He said: "Bring the meat close to your mouth, for that is more wholesome and beneficial."
321.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewatinya sementara ia sedang mengambil daging dari tulang dengan tangannya. Beliau bersabda: "Wahai Shafwan." Ia berkata: "Aku siap melayanimu." Beliau bersabda: "Dekatkan daging ke mulutmu, karena itu lebih menyehatkan dan bermanfaat."

322.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that a thief was brought to the Prophet ﷺ who ordered his hand to be cut. He said: "O Messenger of Allah, is a striped garment worth thirty dirhams enough to have someone's hand cut? I will gift it to him or sell it to him." He said: "Why did you not do that before bringing him to me?"
322.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pencuri dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ yang memerintahkan agar tangannya dipotong. Ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, apakah kain bergaris senilai tiga puluh dirham cukup untuk memotong tangan seseorang? Aku akan menghadiahkannya kepadanya atau menjualnya kepadanya." Beliau bersabda: "Mengapa kamu tidak melakukan itu sebelum membawanya kepadaku?"

323.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayya (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "O people, you will soon come to know the people of Paradise from the people of the Fire" — or: "your good ones from your bad ones." A man said: "By what criterion, O Messenger of Allah?" He said: "By praise — bad praise and good praise. You are Allah's witnesses over one another."
323.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Wahai manusia, kalian akan segera mengetahui penghuni surga dari penghuni neraka" — atau: "yang baik di antara kalian dari yang buruk." Seorang laki-laki berkata: "Dengan kriteria apa, ya Rasulullah?" Beliau bersabda: "Dengan pujian — pujian buruk dan pujian baik. Kalian adalah saksi-saksi Allah satu sama lain."

324.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "This is the day of Ashura — fast it." A man from Banu Amr ibn Awf said: "O Messenger of Allah, I left my people — some of them fasting and some not." The Prophet ﷺ said: "Go to them. Whoever among them is not fasting — let him complete the fast."
324.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ini adalah hari Asyura — berpuasalah padanya." Seorang laki-laki dari Banu Amr bin Auf berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, aku meninggalkan kaumku — sebagian dari mereka berpuasa dan sebagian tidak." Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Pergilah kepada mereka. Siapa pun di antara mereka yang tidak berpuasa — biarkan ia menyempurnakan puasanya."

325.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "This child climbed onto the back of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was in prostration. I held back from prostrating. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ finished the prayer, the people said: 'O Messenger of Allah, you prostrated in the middle of the prayer with a long prostration — we thought something had happened or that revelation was coming.' He said: 'Neither of those — but my grandson was riding on my back and I disliked hurrying him until he had finished what he needed.'"
325.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Anak ini naik ke punggung Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau dalam keadaan sujud. Aku menahan diri dari sujud. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ selesai shalat, orang-orang berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, engkau sujud di tengah shalat dengan sujud yang panjang — kami mengira sesuatu telah terjadi atau bahwa wahyu sedang datang.' Beliau bersabda: 'Bukan keduanya — tetapi cucuku sedang menunggangi punggungku dan aku tidak suka terburu-buru membuatnya turun sampai ia selesai dengan keperluannya.'"
